name: revit_export_pipe_system
description: Enumerates all pipes and pipe fittings in the document, logging connector endpoints, diameters, and inferred fitting types (plug, elbow, tee) to debug output.

system_type.description: Optional MEP system type name filter (not yet implemented; exports all pipes and fittings)

notes: Currently writes to Debug.Print only. For MCP use, capture output into a structured JSON payload of pipes and fittings with connector XYZ endpoints.
